commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for blocking sanitizer correctness plus real behavior proof; do not queue automated repair while after-fix provider proof is missing.; Needs attention: The patch touches a reasoning-leak security boundary and still leaves concrete final-message and streaming paths where private reasoning can become visible.; Review finding: [P1] Match the reported delimiter with trailing whi... (sha=3bc2cbcb8ebc739e585566fe192df361e25e776d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an Ollama Kimi-cloud visible-text sanitizer for inline reasoning delimiters and regression tests for final-message and stream-event output.

PR surface: Source +72, Tests +114. Total +186 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence mocked NDJSON reproduction: send a Kimi cloud first chunk with a long reasoning prefix and no delimiter, then a later chunk with the U+FE0F delimiter and answer; the patched stream path emits the first prefix as visible text before stripping can happen.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for blocking sanitizer correctness plus real behavior proof; do not queue automated repair while after-fix provider proof is missing.

target.title: fix(ollama): strip inline kimi cloud reasoning leak
target.body:
## Summary
- add Ollama Kimi-cloud response sanitizer for leaked inline reasoning prefixes in visible assistant text
- scope sanitizer to `kimi-k*:cloud` and boundary-delimited payloads only, with conservative guards to avoid clipping normal output
- add regression coverage in Ollama stream runtime tests

## Changes
- `extensions/ollama/src/stream.ts`
  - added `stripKimiInlineReasoningFromVisibleText(...)`
  - invoke sanitizer from `buildAssistantMessage(...)` before publishing visible `text` blocks
- `extensions/ollama/src/stream-runtime.test.ts`
  - new test: strips inline reasoning prefix for `kimi-k2.6:cloud`
  - new test: does not strip boundary marker for non-Kimi models

## Validation
- local focused run previously passed on the working tree:
  - `pnpm -s vitest run extensions/ollama/src/stream-runtime.test.ts`
  - result: `1 file passed, 84 tests passed`
- clean worktree rerun in this environment timed out under repeated plugin timing output before completion.

## Live behavior proof status
- CLI proof attempts were run in this runtime via `ollama run ... --think false` for both:
  - `kimi-k2.6:cloud`
  - `kimi-k2.5:cloud`
- both returned:
  - `403 Forbidden: this model requires a subscription, upgrade for access`
- proof artifacts captured at:
  - `/tmp/issue-86129-proof/cli-baseline.txt`
  - `/tmp/issue-86129-proof/kimi-k26-think-false.full.txt`
  - `/tmp/issue-86129-proof/kimi-k25-think-false.full.txt`

Fixes #86129
target.author: jason-allen-oneal

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
